calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-01-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Placing the Terms and Conditions of Settlement on the Record.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Joseph M. Breall, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff RTI PROPERTIES, INC.
Robert A. Abbasi, President/CEO RTI Properties, Inc.
Michael W.D. Melchin, Esq., appearing for Defendant RICHARD A. LOHR.
Defendant Richard A. Lohr.
Case settled at conference with Pro-Tem Judge.
Terms and conditions of Settlement read into the record by counsel
Court to retain jurisdiction under CCP 664.6.

Court ordered case removed from the Trial Calendar and scheduled for an OSC re: dismissal per CRC 3.1385 on December 1, 2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
